mapper.sql: wo.id, wo.task_id, wo.engineer_id, wo.checkin_time, wo.checkout_time, wo.checkin_location, wo.checkout_location, wo.checkin_photo, wo.status, wo.total_duration, wo.photo_count, wo.remark, wo.create_time, t.task_name, p.id AS project_id, p.project_name, u.real_name AS engineer_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN project_task t ON t.id = wo.task_id AND t.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = wo.engineer_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE wo.id = #{id} AND wo.deleted = 0

SELECT id, task_id, engineer_id, checkin_time, checkout_time, checkin_location, checkout_location, checkin_photo, status, total_duration, photo_count, remark, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM work_order WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
